title: L&D Training Effectiveness Report - DevOps Fundamentals: CI/CD, K8s, Monitoring
executiveSummary: The selected scope contains 1 course(s), 1 completed course(s), and 10 trainee-course records. Overall attendance is 96%, completion is 100%, pass rate is 100%, and average score is 7.89/10. Total training hours are 216 and scaled cost is 15. Overall effectiveness classification is Effective. Management interpretation: The training course 'DevOps Fundamentals: CI/CD, K8s, Monitoring' has demonstrated high effectiveness, achieving a 100% completion and pass rate, with an overall attendance rate of 96%. The average score of 7.89 out of 10 and a feedback rating of 4.6 out of 5 further indicate strong trainee engagement and satisfaction. The total training hours amounted to 216, with a scaled cost of 15, resulting in an effectiveness score of 92.28.
insights: DevOps Fundamentals: CI/CD, K8s, Monitoring has an effectiveness score of 92.28 in the selected scope.
The course has successfully met all key performance indicators, including attendance, completion, and assessment pass rates.
The high average score suggests that the content was well-received and effectively delivered.
The feedback rating indicates that trainees found the course valuable, which is essential for future training initiatives.
recommendations: Maintain the current delivery model and reuse top-performing materials for future cohorts.
To maintain and enhance the effectiveness of this training program, it is recommended to continue monitoring trainee feedback and performance metrics.
Consider implementing additional advanced modules or follow-up sessions to further deepen the knowledge gained from this course.
Additionally, leveraging the high engagement levels to promote mentorship opportunities could benefit both high-performing trainees and the organization.

checklist.detail: Required sheets and columns were mapped from Teams, OneDrive, Forms, KPI, Rules and Template sources.
Expected attendance rows are trainee count x total sessions. Late is retained for metrics as partial attendance.
Completed courses require one valid assessment and pass-status row per trainee.
NORM-14 requires at least 60% feedback response rate for valid analysis.
Duplicate rows and numeric ranges were checked before metric generation.

checklist.check: Consistency: course ID and pass-status logic
checklist.detail: Cross-source course IDs and pass-status logic were checked against the selected course catalog.
